item.title: We may be on the cusp of a new industrial cycle, says Bank of America. How to play it â and score attractive yields
item.description: Bank of America sees opportunity for income as industrial growth takes off.

item.title: Leon Cooperman's Omega builds stake in this mortgage lender
item.description: Cooperman bought more than $375 million worth of shares in the Detroit-based mortgage provider during the fourth quarter of last year.

item.title: Melius upgrades Chevron, sees upside from Venezuela and exploration push
item.description: Melius' updated price forecast implies that shares of Chevron could add 13% from here.

item.title: Goldman says these software stocks have 'moats' that can thwart AI disruption
item.description: The firm called out a slew of buy-rated software stocks, including Snowflake and MongoDB, as the sector slides.

item.title: Value investor Seth Klarman added Amazon last quarter. Here's what else he bought
item.description: The Boston-based hedge fund manager took a new position in the hyperscaler amounting to $489.7 million.
